plugins.name: specscore
plugins.description: SpecScore CLI plugin: skills that teach AI agents how to use the specscore CLI for spec navigation, linting, and lifecycle operations.

plugins.name: specstudio
plugins.description: SpecScore Studio — AI skills for spec-driven development: specify, plan, build, verify, review, ship. Turns vague ideas into lint-clean SpecScore artifacts and gates implementation on approval.
